subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond mention and utterance, beseemeth the Desired One of all worlds, Who hath illumined the world with the rays of His celestial luminary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که عالم را بانوار نیر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
